title: The Great Mental Models Volume 1: General Thinking Concepts
subtitle: An accessible introduction to the nine most versatile mental models for better decision-making, drawn from physics, mathematics, biology, and philosophy.
author: Shane Parrish
awards: Amazon Best Seller in Decision-Making & Problem Solving
excerpt: A small number of thinking tools — mental models — govern how the world works. Master them, and you gain the ability to see reality more clearly, make better decisions, and avoid the traps that catch most people. This book introduces nine of the most powerful: from the map that is not the territory to second-order thinking, each model is a lens that reveals what others miss.
